_comment: FOMC meeting dates pulled from federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm. Each entry is the *second* (decision) day of the meeting — the day the rate statement is released at 14:00 ET. The blackout is anchored to this date. Update when the Fed publishes a new annual schedule (typically each summer). Phase 5: see master.md hard invariant 6 — schedulers must honor this list.
